checkpoint: CMS-SA v0.4.8 - Authorized Apply Executor Dry-Apply Sandbox
non_claim_lock: Authorized dry-apply sandboxes are repository-bound execution simulations and do not prove code correctness, truth, AGI, consciousness, production readiness, security, external validation, autonomous repair authority, or real-world correctness.
primary_lock: No dry-apply sandbox may write live target surfaces. It may only simulate packet execution against virtual or copied targets, compare before/after hashes inside the sandbox, simulate rollback, preserve blocked actions, and emit validation evidence.
